O. 287(E).— Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7A of the Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 (6 of 1991), the Central Government framed a scheme, namely, "the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008"; And, whereas, sub-paragraph (1) of paragraph 4 of the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008 provided that the United India Insurance Company Limited shall be the Fund Manager of the said scheme for a period of five years from the date of notification of the said scheme; And, whereas, the five year term of the said Fund Manager expired on 3rd November, 2013; And, whereas, by a notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests number G.S.R. 497 (E), dated the 10th July, 2014, the Central Government reappointed the United India Insurance Company Limited as a Fund Manager for a period upto 31st December, 2014; And, whereas, the Central Government has considered it necessary to extend the term of the said Fund Manager for a period upto 30th June, 2015. Now, therefore, in pursuance of sub-paragraph (2) of paragraph 4 of the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008, and in supersession of the said notification number G.S.R. 497(E), dated the 10th July, 2014, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby reappoints the United India Insurance Company Limited as a Fund Manager under the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008, for a period up to 30th June, 2015. [ F. No. 18-13/91-PL-HSMD] BISHWANATH SINHA , Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
